result:
The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The cleaned dataset has been saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with the following variables:

1. NSID - Original cohort member identifier from source data
2. partnradu - Collapsed harmonized marital status variable (time-invariant, prioritizing most recent valid response)
3. partnr19 - Age-specific marital status at age 19 (Sweep 6)
4. partnr25 - Age-specific marital status at age 25 (Wave 8)
5. partnr32 - Age-specific marital status at age 32 (Sweep 9)

Key processing steps completed:
- Loaded 5 tab-delimited files from data/input/ directory
- Merged datasets using full_join by NSID
- Standardized missing value codes according to metadata mappings
- Harmonized marital status categories across waves (Single, Married, Separated, Divorced, Widowed, Civil Partner)
- Created both collapsed (partnradu) and age-specific (partnr19, partnr25, partnr32) variables
- Applied proper factor labels for all categorical variables
- Output contains 16,111 cohort members with 5 variables
